sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 애브비는 2025년 3분기 27억 달러 규모의 IPR&D 비용 발생을 반영하여 연간 및 분기 주당순이익 가이던스를 조정했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 3분기 중 27억 달러 규모의 취득 IPR&D 및 마일스톤 비용이 발생할 것으로 예상됩니다.
해당 비용 반영으로 인해 GAAP 및 비GAAP 기준 희석 주당순이익에 각각 1.50달러의 부정적 영향이 예상됩니다.

businessChanges.text: 협업, 라이선스 계약 및 기타 자산 인수 실행에 따라 IPR&D 및 마일스톤 비용이 발생할 수 있으나, 발생 시점의 불확실성으로 인해 해당 비용은 별도로 예측하지 않습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 연간 조정 희석 주당순이익 가이던스 범위는 10.38달러에서 10.58달러로 조정되었습니다.

watchItems.text: 3분기 실적 마감 절차 이후 최종 확정될 실제 주당순이익과 현재 예비 추정치 간의 차이 발생 여부를 확인해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition Reported GAAP earnings and adjusted non-GAAP earnings for the third quarter of 2025 are expected to include acquired IPR&D and milestones expense of $2.7 billion on a pre-tax basis, representing an unfavorable impact of $1.50 to both GAAP diluted earnings per share and adjusted non-GAAP diluted earnings per share. Results for the quarter ended September 30, 2025 have not been finalized and are subject to our financial statement closing procedures. There can be no assurance that our final results will not differ from these preliminary estimates. While acquired IPR&D and milestones expense may be incurred upon execution of collaborations, licensing agreements, and other asset acquisitions, AbbVie does not forecast acquired IPR&D and milestones expense due to uncertainty of the future occurrence and timing of these transactions. Adjust  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.7 billion = 27억 달러; $2.7 = 2.7달러; $1.50 = 1.50달러.

ed diluted earnings per share guidance for 2025 previously announced on July 31, 2025 excluded the impact of acquired IPR&D and milestones expense that may be incurred beyond the second quarter of 2025. AbbVie’s full-year 2025 adjusted diluted earnings per share guidance range, including the impact of third quarter 2025 acquired IPR&D and milestones expense, is $10.38 - $10.58. AbbVie’s third quarter 2025 adjusted diluted earnings per share guidance range, including the impact of third quarter 2025 acquired IPR&D and milestones expense, is $1.74 - $1.78. Furnished as Exhibit 99.1 to this Current Report on Form 8-K and incorporated herein by reference is guidance for 2025 including the estimated acquired IPR&D and milestones expense incurred during the third quarter of 2025. The information set forth in this Current Report on Form 8-K, including Exhibit 99.1, shall not be deemed "Filed" f  Normalized numeric aliases: $10.38 = 10.38달러; $10.58 = 10.58달러; $1.74 = 1.74달러; $1.78 = 1.78달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
